### exit 1
### stdout
### stderr
WARNING! stowing pkg would cause conflicts:
  * cannot stow non-directory ../stow/pkg/f over existing directory target f
All operations aborted.
### tree
dir  home
dir  stow
dir  stow/pkg
file stow/pkg/f 0644 2d711642b726b04401627ca9fbac32f5c8530fb1903cc4db02258717921a4881
dir  target
dir  target/f
